steer_block_used:
When multiple plausible bases could justify a decision, identify the single strongest basis and make the LABEL reflect that basis.
Do not rely on vague or mixed justifications when one basis is clearly more decisive.
The REASON should state the primary basis for the decision clearly and directly.
If no single basis is clearly strongest, output CLARIFY.
